    I

    INCOME - Enum constant in enum class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.model.TransactionType
     
    information(String, String) - Static method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.service.DialogService
    Shows an information dialog.
    initialize() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.controller.AddTransactionScreenController
    Sets up the transaction form when the screen loads.
    initialize() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.controller.ChartsScreenController
    Loads chart data when the screen opens.
    initialize() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.controller.EditCategoryScreenController
    Pre-fills the form with the current category name when the screen loads.
    initialize() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.controller.EditTransactionScreenController
    Pre-fills the form with the current transaction data when the screen loads.
    initialize() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.controller.HomeScreenController
    Sets up the home screen when it loads.
    initialize() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.controller.ManageAccountScreenController
    Pre-fills the form with the current user's profile data when the screen loads.
    initialize() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.controller.ManageCategoriesScreenController
    Sets up the table columns and loads all categories when the screen opens.
    initialize() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.controller.ManageTransactionsScreenController
    Sets up the filter dropdowns, table columns and loads all transactions when the screen opens.
    initializeForm() - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.controller.TransactionFormIncludeController
    Sets up the shared form fields with default values.
